items.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Neighbors asked to look for older video footage
items.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

items.title: WATCH:  Dogs take on the Winter Games
items.description: As the real Winter Games take place thousands of miles away in Italy, two dogs brought it home in the U.S., delivering gold-medal-worthy performances.

items.title: WATCH:  Couple's love story started on a boat as volunteers
items.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to Gary and Susan, who met while providing medical care aboard a hospital ship.

items.title: Minneapolis live updates: Minneapolis surge ending, Homan says
items.description: The White House's border czar, Tom Homan, said last Thursday that he expected a partial drawdown of federal agents to begin in Minnesota.

items.title: 2 US Navy ships collide in Caribbean, minor injuries reported
items.description: Two U.S. Navy ships collided in the Caribbean on Wednesday resulting in two minor injuries, both ships are continuing to sail safely.
